camera.Notes: Frame all three podiums with ~0.55 m breathing room above the center character. Use target/lookAt as authoritative.

sceneNodes.notes: Global origin; all authored coordinates are world-space in meters.
Suggested radius 1.85 m; top Y = 0.58–0.61 m.
Suggested radius 1.55 m; top Y = 0.40–0.43 m.
Suggested radius 1.55 m; top Y = 0.40–0.43 m.
Distant U-shaped junkyard mound and wreck perimeter.
Drag-to-rotate pivot; rotate display root, not the UI.

lights.Notes: Cool sky contribution with warm/dark ground color #21150E; no direct shadows.
Moved beyond the orbit envelope; sweeps the distant left junkyard backdrop without intersecting the camera.
Moved beyond the orbit envelope; sweeps the distant right junkyard backdrop without intersecting the camera.
Cool top/back rim for first-place silhouette and metallic separation.
Broad low-contrast fill to keep armor details visible without flattening the scene.
Creates upper-left smoke shaft and junk silhouette.
Creates upper-right smoke shaft and rocket silhouette.
Supports completed pedestal orange emissive strips; disable if pedestal bloom is sufficient.
Warm practical in left junk cluster.
Faint far-right practical; should not compete with hero keys.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Global fog
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Color #15191C; height falloff 0.42; start distance 2.5 m.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Local haze left
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Bounds center (-4.5,1.7,-2.8), size (4.0,3.4,4.0), noise scale 1.6 m.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Local haze center
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Bounds center (0,2.0,-3.2), size (5.0,4.0,3.5), noise scale 2.0 m.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Local haze right
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Bounds center (4.5,1.7,-2.8), size (4.0,3.4,4.0), noise scale 1.5 m.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Embers
atmosphereAndPost.notes: World bounds 15x7x8 m; upward drift 0.25 m/s; lifetime 2.4–5.0 s; orange emissive; no collisions.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Bloom
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Threshold 1.1; knee 0.55; limit bloom to practicals and podium emissives.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Color grade
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Contrast +0.12; saturation -0.08; warm highlights, cool shadows.

atmosphereAndPost.name: SSAO
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Strength 0.85; bias 0.025; half-resolution acceptable on mobile.

atmosphereAndPost.name: Depth of field
atmosphereAndPost.notes: Focus distance ~13.1 m; subtle only—leaderboard assets must remain readable.

assets.name: Lr300 Worldmodel
assets.placementRule: Cross with AKs, tips above shoulder line

assets.name: Mp5 Worldmodel
assets.placementRule: Use lower in composition around crates

assets.name: Junkyard Stack J
assets.placementRule: Cluster by rank; center receives largest mass

assets.name: Lootbarrel Junk
assets.placementRule: One barrel per podium, center plus extra crate

assets.name: Rocketlauncher Worldmodel
assets.placementRule: One launcher per podium; rank 1 gets raised hero angle

assets.name: Rocket Mlrs Worldmodel
assets.placementRule: Vertical cluster plus loose horizontal rounds

assets.name: Conc Pile 6X6
assets.placementRule: Pile by rank; avoid rank-number plaque

assets.name: Fuel Barrel Red
assets.placementRule: Keep away from mannequin feet by 0.25 m

assets.name: Attackhelicopter Entity
assets.placementRule: Scale to 4.5–5.0 m and suspend at y=3.8 m

assets.name: Compact Car A Rusty
assets.placementRule: Partially crop each vehicle; use different yaw
